body_transformation: The rounded cat-like silhouette retains its quadruped stance and low crawling posture, but the fluffy pink fur transforms into a translucent violet membrane with visible internal energy currents flowing beneath its surface. The curled tail tip now trails wispy shadowy vapour that dissolves into the air, while the large round eyes maintain their shape but appear as hollow sockets filled with swirling crimson mist. Short stubby legs remain planted on the ground, their structure unchanged but now partially dissolving at the edges into thin air. The pointed ears retain their shape but become tattered and wispy, glowing faintly with pale silver energy.
signature_feature: Tail tip: tattered wispy vapour trailing ghostly white mist and subtle energy ripples.
